context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the code-review instructions from the published Elixir Phoenix Skills plugin.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Self-review the actual full branch diff using the Review Order below.

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Large diff (>50 files)**: Prioritize **Critical** checks first; sample key files for **Suggestion** items.

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Use **only** these labels:

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **`Critical`** — security, data loss, crash, or **Always Critical** (see below). Block merge.

checklist.name: instruction-5
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Always Critical (flag every occurrence):**

checklist.name: instruction-6
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: `Repo` calls inside LiveViews — must delegate to context modules

checklist.name: instruction-7
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: `{:reply, ...}` from handle_event (should always be `{:noreply, socket}`)

checklist.name: instruction-8
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: [lib/my_app/accounts.ex:42] (Security) `String.to_atom(params["role"])` on user input causes atom table exhaustion. **Mitigation:** Use explicit case with whitelist instead.

checklist.name: instruction-9
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Re-review required:** Yes — Critical fixes must be re-diffed before approval.

checklist.name: instruction-10
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Findings must come from an actual diff or provided file contents — do not present a simulated review as-if real.
